title: Hiring Store Manager at Spar India

jsonLd.title: Hiring Store Manager at Spar India
jsonLd.description:
Spar India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Store Manager to join our dynamic team in Lucknow. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Spar India:
Spar India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Retail Operations

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual performance appraisal
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Spar India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
